channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: Sign-Language Datasets at Scale: A Comprehensive Survey on Resources, Benchmarks, and Annotation Standards
item.description: arXiv:2606.19352v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sign languages are expressive visual languages used by Deaf and Hard-of-Hearing (DHH) communities. Despite substantial progress in sign-language recognition, translation, and production, advances remain constrained by fragmented datasets, inconsistent...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> release, product, arxiv, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Hidden Anchors in Multi-Agent LLM Deliberation
item.description: arXiv:2606.19494v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multi-agent LLM deliberation, where agents exchange and revise answers over several rounds, is increasingly used to improve reasoning and accuracy, yet how and why it works is rarely modelled. Such deliberation mirrors how humans reach decisions. As s...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, LLM, model, reasoning, API | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns
item.description: Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: cAPM: Continual AI-Assisted Pace-Mapping with Active Learning
item.description: arXiv:2606.19373v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Ventricular tachycardia is a life-threatening rhythm disorder and a major cause of sudden cardiac death. Pace-mapping is a clinical procedure for identifying the intervention target during catheter ablation of VT. It requires clinicians to pace differ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> ICL, arxiv, API, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
